Case Study • Various

Dholakia Technologies (Craft Lab Grown Diamonds) Successfully Re-Certified for SCS-007 Certification

Growlity, a global leader in ESG & Sustainability Management advisory, proudly announces the successful re-certification of Dholakia Technologies LLP and their globally recognized brand, Craft Lab Grown Diamonds, under the prestigious SCS-007 Sustainability Rated Diamonds Certification by SCS Global Services, California, USA.

This achievement underscores Craft Lab Grown Diamonds’ unwavering commitment to environmental stewardship, ethical responsibility, and climate-conscious luxury. The SCS-007 Certification is the most rigorous sustainability standard for the diamond industry, ensuring transparency, climate neutrality, and social responsibility throughout the value chain.

Setting a Benchmark in Sustainability

The SCS-007 Certification process is a meticulous and comprehensive evaluation, covering key pillars such as verified origin traceability, climate neutrality, ethical stewardship, sustainable production practices, and comprehensive sustainability investments. This standard sets an exceptional benchmark for the lab-grown diamond industry, reassuring consumers that each diamond they purchase is not just beautiful but also responsibly sourced.

Quotes from Leadership

Mr. Rajesh Dholakia, Director of Dholakia Technologies LLP and Craft Lab Grown Diamonds, expressed his pride in this milestone:

“Achieving the SCS-007 re-certification is a testament to our dedication to sustainability, innovation, and ethical practices. As a brand, we are committed to leading the industry towards a greener and more responsible future. Growlity’s expertise played a crucial role in navigating this complex certification process, ensuring that our operations align with the highest global standards.”

Mr. Jay Kapadia, Vice President at Growlity, emphasized the significance of this certification:

“The SCS-007 Certification is not just a label; it is a rigorous standard that requires companies to uphold the highest levels of environmental and social accountability. The stringent audit process conducted by SCS Global Services ensures complete transparency, making it one of the most credible sustainability certifications in the diamond industry. We at Growlity are honored to support Craft Lab Grown Diamonds in this journey and celebrate their continued success in sustainable luxury.”

Redefining the Future of Diamonds

Craft Lab Grown Diamonds continues to lead the way in transforming the diamond industry by setting new sustainability standards. With increasing consumer demand for responsibly sourced gems, achieving this certification reinforces their position as a pioneer in ethical luxury and sustainable craftsmanship.

As the world moves towards a more sustainable future, Growlity remains committed to empowering businesses worldwide with expert advisory and consulting services, ensuring they achieve ESG excellence and sustainability leadership.
